name: Vulkar
description: Built by the Grineer for their elite troopers, the Vulkar is a devastating distance weapon. In the right hands it is capable of taking down targets long before they get into attack range.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Built by the Grineer for their elite troopers, the Vulkar is a devastating distance weapon. In the right hands it is capable of taking down targets long before they get into attack range.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vulkar and Vulkar Wraith incorrect headshot damage (now: Zoom1 35%, Zoom2 55%).

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.6 + 22.0.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the headshot damage of the Vulkar series, Snipetron series and Vectis series in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes: The Vulkar Wraith is now tradable!

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.7.2
patchlogs.changes: Lowered the Ammo pool of Vulkar Wraith in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.6.0 + 19.6.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Vulkar and Vulkar Wraith are now usable in Conclave!

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inadvertent Vulkar Riven Mod nerf.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Visually updated the Vulkar Sniper scope.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.13.2
patchlogs.fixes: Ballistas will have telegraphing when they are winding up to fire off a round from their deadly Vulkars. An observant Tenno will be better able to identify and prioritize these threats.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Vulkar Wraith not appearing in the codex.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.changes: Made some adjustments to the Vulkar Wraith’s audio FX.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.changes: Vulkar: Lasting Purity: adds 15% dead aim

patchlogs.name: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive
patchlogs.fixes: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive Psa: The Launcher May Require You To Enter Your Windows Administrator Password To Update Your Firewall Rules.Avalanche Offensive Is On Until Monday @ 12 Noon Edt! Avalanche Offensivedefeat The Corpus Arctic Eximus!A Message From Cantis Of The Red Veil Resistance:Here'S What You'Ll Need To Dogo Forth And Take Down The Corpus Arctic Eximus, Tenno!Additions:Weapon Balance Changes:     • Grakata    • Castanas    • Ogris    • Torid    • Penta    • Lanka    • Vectis    • Vulkar    • Angstrum:    • Acrid:    • Attica:    • Spectra & Flux Rifle:    • Snipetron (+Vandal):    • Torid Changes:    • All Launchers:Key Hosting Improvements:Changes:Fixes:

patchlogs.name: Update 12: Zephyr Rises
patchlogs.changes: Vulkar now has increased damage and proc rate.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Vulkar Pack is now live! Get your snipin’ on in Grineer Style!
